settings.title: Extraction Policy Settings
settings.validation_failed: Validation failed, please check your input

cache.title: Cache Configuration
cache.max_capacity_hint: Maximum number of entries in the L1 cache
cache.l2_enabled_hint: Enable secondary cache for improved long-term cache performance
cache.l2_capacity_hint: Maximum number of entries in the secondary cache

search_config.title: Search Configuration
search_config.default_max_results_hint: Maximum number of results returned per search
search_config.cache_enabled_hint: Cache search results for improved repeat query performance
search_config.cache_size_hint: Maximum number of entries in the search cache

task_manager.title: Task Manager Configuration
task_manager.max_concurrent_tasks_hint: Maximum number of tasks executing simultaneously
task_manager.log_level_hint: Log level for the task manager
task_manager.profiling_hint: Enable task performance profiling and monitoring

extraction.title: Extraction Settings
extraction.use_enhanced_description: Enable advanced features like long path support, deep nesting, and zip bomb detection
extraction.concurrent_auto: 0 means auto-detect based on CPU cores

security.title: Security Settings
security.zip_bomb_description: Detect and block maliciously crafted archives

paths.title: Path Settings
paths.long_paths_description: Support filenames longer than 255 characters (Windows UNC paths)

errors.max_depth_range: Max depth must be between 1 and 20
errors.hash_length_range: Hash length must be between 8 and 32
errors.parallel_files_range: Parallel files must be between 1 and 8

file_filter.title: File Filter Settings
file_filter.layer1_binary: Layer 1: Binary file detection (auto-detect images, videos, executables)
file_filter.layer2_smart: Layer 2: Smart filter rules (filename patterns + extension whitelist/blacklist)
file_filter.defensive_design: Defensive design: any error defaults to allowing files through
file_filter.binary_detection_hint: Automatically detect binary formats like images, videos, and executables by reading only the first 1KB for magic number detection
file_filter.smart_filter_hint: Further filter files by filename patterns and extension lists. Supports extensionless log files (e.g., syslog, messages)
file_filter.whitelist_description: Whitelist: only import files matching filename patterns or in the extension whitelist
file_filter.blacklist_description: Blacklist: skip files matching the extension blacklist
file_filter.glob_hint: Wildcards supported: * (any characters), ? (single character). Example: *log* matches app.log, error_log, mylog.txt
